meta.title: Task Center
meta.description: Complete simple actions to unlock bonus credits.

title: Task Center
description: Complete simple tasks to unlock bonus credits and referral rewards.

summary.title: Complete tasks and unlock more credits
summary.subtitle: Check back anytime, finish a task, and claim the reward when it is ready.
summary.completedTasksHint: The more you complete, the more you unlock

daily_checkin.title: Daily Check-In
daily_checkin.description: Come back once a day and claim your daily credit bonus.

checkin_3_days.title: Check In 3 Days in a Row
checkin_3_days.description: Complete your daily check-in for three consecutive days to unlock an extra bonus.

first_public_generation.title: First Public Creation
first_public_generation.description: Create your first successful public work to unlock this one-time reward.

first_purchase.title: First Credit Pack / Subscription Purchase
first_purchase.description: Complete your first successful purchase of a credit pack or subscription to claim extra credits.

invite_signup.title: Invite 1 Friend to Sign Up
invite_signup.description: Earn {signupCredit} credits for each friend who signs up, plus {firstOrderReward} back after their first paid order.

invite_first_purchase.title: Friend Completes First Purchase
invite_first_purchase.description: When any invited friend completes their first paid order, you receive the reward defined in your referral program.

github_star.title: Star the GitHub Project
github_star.description: Star the project on GitHub, then submit a screenshot and note for review.

huggingface_like.title: Like the Hugging Face Space
huggingface_like.description: Like the Space on Hugging Face, then submit a screenshot and note for review.

share_twitter.title: Share the Website on X
share_twitter.description: Share the website on X, then submit a screenshot and note for review.

share_facebook.title: Share the Website on Facebook
share_facebook.description: Share the website on Facebook, then submit a screenshot and note for review.

share_tiktok.title: Share the Website on TikTok
share_tiktok.description: Share the website on TikTok, then submit a screenshot and note for review.

share_instagram.title: Share the Website on Instagram
share_instagram.description: Share the website on Instagram, then submit a screenshot and note for review.

manualSubmission.description: Complete the task at the linked page, then send your proof for review.
manualSubmission.screenshotHint: Upload exactly one JPEG, PNG, or WebP image up to 5 MB.
manualSubmission.screenshotAlt: Preview of the proof screenshot for {title}
manualSubmission.textPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you completed and where it appears in the screenshot.

validation.screenshotType: Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
validation.screenshotSize: The screenshot must be no larger than 5 MB.
validation.textLength: The submission note must be between 1 and 500 characters.

errors.upload: The screenshot could not be uploaded. Your form has been kept; please try again.
errors.submit: The application could not be submitted. Your form has been kept; please try again.
errors.taskDisabled: This task is no longer accepting submissions.
errors.alreadyClaimed: You have already received this task reward.
errors.pending: This task already has an application under review.
errors.invalidEvidence: The uploaded screenshot could not be verified. Please choose it again.
errors.validation: Check the screenshot and note, then submit again.

manualSubmission.success: Your proof was submitted and is now under review.

topUp.title: Running out of credits?
topUp.description: Go to subscription and top-up options

referrals.title: Still want free credits?
referrals.description: Open the referral center and invite friends

toast.alreadyClaimed: This reward has already been claimed.
toast.notCompleted: Task requirements are not completed yet.
